---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2b45,#1a4a6e); color:white; padding:1rem 2rem;">
  <div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">
    <p style="color:#c8d8e8; font-size:1rem;">
      High-resolution climate modeling · Cryosphere dynamics · Glacier mass balance · Permafrost · High mountain hydroclimate · Heatwaves · Human-climate interactions in High Mountain Asia and the contiguous United States
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TWO COLUMN LAYOUT -->
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:220px 1fr; gap:2rem; padding:2rem;">

  <!-- PROFILE SIDEBAR -->
  <div>
    <div class="profile-card">
      <img src="figures/Tika_Face.JPG" alt="Tika Ram Gurung"/>
      <div class="profile-name">Tika Ram Gurung</div>
      <div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate<br/>University of Nebraska-Lincoln</div>
      <ul class="profile-links">
        <li>📍 Lincoln, NE</li>
        <li>✉️ <a href="mailto:tikargrg@gmail.com">tikargrg@gmail.com</a></li>
        <li>🔬 <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a></li>
        <li>🎓 <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a></li>
        <li>💼 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tika-ram-gurung-55a743a3/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
        <li>🔵 <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4287-6150" target="_blank">ORCID</a></li>
        <li>🐦 <a href="https://x.com/TR_Gurung" target="_blank">X / Twitter</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <div>

    <!-- PhD Dissertation -->
    <div class="section-title">Ph.D. Dissertation Work</div>
    <br/>
    <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.8rem 2rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; border-left:4px solid #1a4a6e;">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.3rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
        High-Resolution Climate Simulations and Impacts of Local Human Factors on Hydroclimate and Glacier Dynamics in High Mountain Asia
      </h3>
      <p style="color:#4a5568; font-size:0.93rem; line-height:1.75;">
        My dissertation examines how large-scale irrigation across South Asia perturbs the regional hydroclimate system and remote glacier dynamics in the Himalaya and Karakoram, using high-resolution WRF regional climate models.
      </p>
      <p style="margin-top:0.4rem; font-size:0.88rem; color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">
        University of Nebraska-Lincoln · Expected Summer 2026
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Ongoing Work -->
    <div style="background:#fff8e7; border-left:4px solid #c9a84c; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; padding:1.2rem 1.5rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#4a5568; margin:0;">
        🔬 <strong>Ongoing Work:</strong> Two active projects investigate how irrigation-driven climate changes propagate into moisture transport across South Asia and glacier mass balance in High Mountain Asia. Figures and preliminary results are highlighted on the
        <a href="index.html" style="color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">Home page →</a>
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Published Work -->
    <div class="section-title">Published Work</div>
    <br/>

    <div class="pub-item" style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
      <div class="pub-title">Evaluating the Performance of High-Resolution Climate Simulations over the Central Himalaya and Karakoram</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Chen, L., Ali, S.H., Rowe, C., Arriola, F.M. and Ritzema, R.S.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Climate Dynamics, 64(3), p.120 · 2026</div>
      <p style="color:#4a5568; font-size:0.88rem; line-height:1.65; margin-top:0.5rem;">
        This study benchmarks WRF simulations against observations across the complex terrain of the Central Himalaya and Karakoram, evaluating their skill in reproducing temperature, precipitation, and atmospheric circulation.
      </p>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-025-08030-x" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">DOI: 10.1007/s00382-025-08030-x →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
      <div class="pub-title">Understanding the Influence of Soil Moisture on Heatwave Characteristics in the Contiguous United States</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong> and Chen, L.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Environmental Research Letters, 19(6) · 2024</div>
      <p style="color:#4a5568; font-size:0.88rem; line-height:1.65; margin-top:0.5rem;">
        Using observational data and model simulations, this paper quantifies how antecedent soil moisture deficits amplify heatwave intensity, duration, and spatial extent across the contiguous US.
      </p>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ad4dbb" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">DOI: 10.1088/1748-9326/ad4dbb →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- Earlier Work -->
    <div class="section-title">Earlier Research</div>
    <br/>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:1.2rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-card-body">
          <span class="tag">Glaciology</span>
          <h3>Glacier Mass Balance — Rikha Samba</h3>
          <p>Long-term mass balance reconstruction (1974–2021) and a decade of in-situ measurements at Rikha Samba Glacier, central Himalaya.</p>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/jog.2022.93" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">Journal of Glaciology →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-card-body">
          <span class="tag">Glaciology</span>
          <h3>Mass Balances — Yala &amp; Rikha Samba</h3>
          <p>Geodetic and glaciological mass balance records (2000–2017) for Yala and Rikha Samba glaciers, Nepal Himalaya.</p>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-13-3791-2021" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">Earth System Science Data →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-card-body">
          <span class="tag">Cryosphere</span><span class="tag">Permafrost</span>
          <h3>Permafrost Change in HMA</h3>
          <p>A comprehensive review of climate change impacts and adaptation related to permafrost dynamics across High Mountain Asia.</p>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/acf1b4" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">Environ. Res. Letters →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-card-body">
          <span class="tag">Hydroclimate</span><span class="tag">Langtang</span>
          <h3>High Mountain Water Cycle — Langtang</h3>
          <p>Multi-year observations of the water cycle in the Langtang catchment, Central Himalaya.</p>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hyp.14189" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600;">Hydrological Processes →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <p style="margin-top:1rem;">
      <a href="publications.html" style="color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">See all publications →</a>
    </p>

  </div>
</div>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Tika Ram Gurung · University of Nebraska-Lincoln</p>
</footer>
` ``
```
